title: Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band
content: {{Top|rwm|ref|imp|reb}} {{MagazineArticle |image=[[File:Whoswhomaxrebo.jpg]] |title="Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band" |author=[[Rich Handley]] |illustrator=[[Justine Mara Andersen]] |editor= |publisher= |release date=[[April 15]], [[2003]]{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2003/03/news20030317.html|text=Celebrate Jedi's 20th in ''Insider'' #67}} |pages= |published in=[[Star Wars Insider 67|''Star Wars Insider'' 67]] |reprinted in= }} "'''Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band'''" is an article that appeared in [[Star Wars Insider 67|''Star Wars Insider'' 67]]. It was written by [[Rich Handley]], with illustrations by [[Justine Mara Andersen]]. It covers the history of the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]]. {{Magazine-stub|article}} ==Contents== *Changing Their Tune... *And Then There Were Twelve... *[[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]]
